narrative:
Monroe Twp/Continental (precinct in Putnam County) has 1,324 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points.
